title: Difference Between ESG and SDG
content: ESG is a framework for grouping environmental, social and governance indicators. SDGs are global sustainable development goals. Borneo Tracker can map some indicators to both views when a relationship is configured.

title: Website Usage
content: Use the dashboard for map and indicator snapshots, Regional Details for territory comparisons, ESG and SDG pages for indicator groupings, News for published insights, Community for discussions, and Generate Report for PDFs.
